plan:
(Screenshot Analysis)  
The screenshot shows a LibreOffice Writer document open on the desktop. The text appears to be in the Georgia font style, as indicated in the font drop-down menu in the toolbar. The task is to change the font to "Times New Roman" throughout the document.  

(Next Action)  
We need to update all the text in the document to "Times New Roman" font style. To do this efficiently, the quickest approach is to select all the text and apply the "Times New Roman" font. I will use the "Ctrl + A" hotkey to select all text.  

(Grounded Action)  
```python
agent.hotkey(["ctrl", "a"])
```

(Screenshot Analysis)  
The text in the document has been successfully highlighted (selected), as indicated by the text being shaded in a different color. This is a prerequisite step for changing the font style to "Times New Roman".

(Next Action)  
The next step is to change the font style of the selected text to "Times New Roman". I will navigate to the font selection drop-down menu, select it, and change the font to "Times New Roman".  

(Grounded Action)  
```python
agent.click('The font drop-down menu at the toolbar showing "Georgia"', 1, "left")
```
